required_wiring: stage_runner creates checkpoint before security gate
stage_runner creates checkpoint after executor completion
security gate block is evaluated before executor
reviewable security failures create interrupt checkpoint instead of executing
malicious prompt injection gate remains hard block

OWASP prompt injection: external/malicious instructions must not become execution authority
